notes:
v1.9.1 Update
✨ New Features:
• Boot Screen Video: Boot screen now supports video files (webm, mp4, m4v, ogg) with audio playback.
• Item Drop Hook: Add-on modules can now respond to item drops on the phone widget.

🆔 ID Card App v1.1.0
• Card Itemization: Export ID cards as Foundry Items and distribute as loot.
• Cards auto-install when picked up, auto-remove when item is deleted from inventory.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone v1.9.1 + ID Card v1.1.0
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v1.9.1

  • 🎬 Boot Video: Use video files (webm, mp4) as boot screens — plays with sound and auto-transitions when finished.
  • 🔌 Item Drop Hook: New extension point for add-on modules to handle item drops on the phone.

ID Card App v1.1.0

  • 📦 Card Itemization: GM can export cards as Foundry Items via the new toolbar button.
  • 🎁 Loot Distribution: Put card items in loot piles or grant directly — cards auto-install on the player's phone when picked up.
  • 🗑️ Auto-Remove: Deleting the item from inventory also removes the card from the phone.
